title: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key

detail.title: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key
detail.short_info: NTA has released the GAT B and BET 2026 provisional answer key, question paper, and recorded responses at exams.nta.nic.in/gat-bet. Check challenge dates, fee, response sheet download process, and latest updates here.

sections.heading: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key

content.text: The Graduate Aptitude Test - Biotechnology (GAT B) and Biotechnology Eligibility Test (BET) 2026 are national‑level examinations conducted by NTA on behalf of the Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Government of India. NTA has now displayed the provisional answer keys along with question papers and recorded responses to ensure transparency and give candidates an opportunity to verify their answers before results are declared.
Direct Link to Download GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key Here

sections.heading: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key - Overview

rows: Graduate Aptitude Test - Biotechnology (GAT B), Biotechnology Eligibility Test (BET) 2026
Provisional answer keys, question papers, recorded responses
Application number and password / date of birth
To be declared after disposal of challenges

sections.heading: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key Download Link

content.text: Candidates must log in using their credentials to access the provisional answer keys and recorded responses for GAT B and BET 2026. NTA has provided a dedicated link for candidate login on the examination services portal, which is also accessible via the official GAT B/BET website.
Official NTA portals for GAT B and BET answer key
Candidates should only use the official NTA portals to download the answer key and response sheet:

items: Main portal: https://exams.nta.nic.in/gat-bet/

Candidate login (examination services): The link shared in the public notice redirects to the Examination Services NIC candidate login, where candidates must enter their application number and password to access answer keys and responses.

content.text: You can embed the user‑supplied direct login URL as:

items: Direct Answer Key Login Link: (Candidate Login - GAT B & BET 2026) - as given by NTA / Examination Services.

content.text: Login and download steps for answer key and recorded responses
Once candidates reach the candidate login page, they can access:

items: Provisional answer key for GAT B 2026
Provisional answer key for BET 2026
Question paper and recorded responses for each exam they appeared in

content.text: This helps them verify each question and their marked answer before deciding whether to file any challenge.

sections.heading: How to Download GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key and Response Sheet

content.text: Step‑by‑step guide for candidates
Use a numbered list for better featured snippet/AI Overview potential.

items: Visit the official GAT B/BET portal at exams.nta.nic.in/gat-bet.
Click on the link titled “Display of Provisional Answer Key(s) and Question Papers with Recorded Responses - GAT B and BET 2026” or similar, as mentioned in the public notice.
You will be redirected to the NTA Examination Services candidate login page.
Enter your Application Number and Password / Date of Birth in the login fields.
After logging in, select the exam (GAT B or BET) you appeared for to view: Provisional answer key Question paper Recorded responses
Provisional answer key
Question paper
Recorded responses
Download the answer key and response sheet in PDF format or take a printout for detailed verification.

content.text: How to calculate marks using the answer key

items: Open your downloaded answer key and recorded responses side by side.

For GAT B and BET, each question carries marks as per the pattern notified in the Information Bulletin (for example, 4 marks for each correct answer with either no negative marking or specified negative marking).
For every correct response, award yourself the full marks specified for that question.
If negative marking is applicable, deduct the specified marks for each incorrect answer according to the official scheme.
Total your marks across all questions to get your approximate score for GAT B or BET.
Treat this score as provisional; final scores will be based on the final answer key after resolution of all challenges.

sections.heading: GAT B and BET 2026 Exam Details and Eligibility (Brief)

content.text: This section captures evergreen queries like “What is GAT B?”, “What is BET?” and supports AI Overview context.
GAT B 2026 - exam pattern and eligibility

The Graduate Aptitude Test - Biotechnology (GAT B) is conducted by NTA for admission to DBT‑supported postgraduate programmes in Biotechnology and allied areas in participating institutions. The exam is a computer‑based test featuring multiple‑choice questions covering topics such as General Biotechnology, Life Sciences, and related subjects, with the detailed syllabus and pattern provided in the Information Bulletin.
Eligibility (in brief):

items: Candidates with a bachelor’s degree in Biotechnology or relevant life science disciplines, with minimum percentage requirements as specified by DBT and participating institutions, are eligible.
Final‑year students meeting the criteria may also apply, subject to conditions mentioned in the official bulletin.

content.text: BET 2026 - exam pattern and eligibility

The Biotechnology Eligibility Test (BET) is conducted for the award of DBT‑Junior Research Fellowship (DBT‑JRF) in Biotechnology and Life Sciences. BET 2026 is also a CBT‑based MCQ exam, designed to test advanced understanding of Biotechnology, with structured sections and a defined marking scheme notified by NTA/DBT.
Eligibility (in brief):

items: Candidates with a postgraduate degree in Biotechnology or relevant disciplines, fulfilling age and percentage conditions laid down by DBT, are eligible to appear for BET.
Detailed category‑wise and course‑wise eligibility is provided in the GAT B/BET 2026 Information Bulletin and should be strictly followed.

sections.heading: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key Challenge Process

content.text: How to raise objections to NTA answer key

NTA has opened an online window to allow candidates to challenge the provisional answer keys of both GAT B and BET 2026. Objections must be filed in online mode only, and challenges sent by email, post, or any other method will not be accepted.
Steps to challenge the answer key:

items: Visit exams.nta.nic.in/gat-bet and click on the “Challenge(s) regarding Answer Key” link for GAT B/BET 2026.
Log in using your Application Number and Password / Date of Birth.
Select the exam (GAT B or BET) and view the question IDs and option IDs as displayed by NTA.
Choose the question(s) you wish to challenge and select the alternate option you believe is correct.
Upload supporting documents or references in a single PDF file (within the size limit specified by NTA, such as 500 KB).
Submit your challenges and proceed to pay the non‑refundable processing fee of Rs 200 per question using debit card, credit card, net banking, or UPI.
Ensure you complete both submission and payment before the deadline (up to 11:50 PM on 24 May 2026).

content.text: Challenge window, fee, and final answer key

items: The answer key challenge facility for GAT B and BET 2026 is available from 23 May 2026 to 24 May 2026 (11:50 PM).
A fee of Rs 200 per question is applicable for every challenge filed, which is non‑refundable.
Challenges submitted without payment or through any medium other than the official online portal will not be considered.
If any challenge is found valid, NTA will revise the answer key accordingly, and the final answer key will be used for result preparation.
The decision of NTA regarding the challenges will be final, and no further correspondence will be entertained.

sections.heading: GAT B and BET 2026 Answer Key - Important Instructions

content.text: This section helps users avoid mistakes and aligns with “What should I do after answer key?” queries.

items: Always verify that you are viewing the correct exam (GAT B or BET) and the correct question paper as per your centre and session.
Use only the official NTA portals (exams.nta.nic.in/gat-bet and the linked Examination Services login) to download answer keys and response sheets.
Carefully read the marking scheme in the Information Bulletin before calculating your score, especially regarding negative marking, if any.
File challenges only if you are confident and have strong academic/reference support; remember that the challenge fee is non‑refundable.
Keep a copy of your downloaded answer key, response sheet, and payment receipt for challenge (if any) until the declaration of results and completion of the selection process.

short_info: NTA has released the GAT B and BET 2026 provisional answer key, question paper, and recorded responses at exams.nta.nic.in/gat-bet. Check challenge dates, fee, response sheet download process, and latest updates here.
